title: Support assignment patterns as children of pins
body:
Currently, initializing a parameter with an assignment pattern causes the following error:

```
Unsupported/Illegal: Assignment pattern member not underneath a supported construct: PIN 
```

This PR is an attempt to fix that. It's a bit hacky, but the problem is that when Verilator tries to convert the parameter value's AST to a constant, it's unable to do so because the pin doesn't have a dtype (the corresponding module var also doesn't have it, but it does have a `childDTypep`, which is what I'm using here).

Of course, I'm open to suggestions on how to do it in a more proper way.
